title: Wynn Aspects reskin
body:
The resourcepack is for beginners who can't remember which class the aspect is for by its shape.
With this resourcepack the aspacs will be in the form of class weapons (warrior - spear, shaman - relic, archer - bow, etc.).

All aspects:


![aspects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e913a77052058abb63a7a09a212045fb583d435a.png)

**!!!SERVER RESOURCEPACK UNLOCKER MOD NEEDED!!!**
